creator: gahr@FreeBSD.org
text:
Jack L. wrote:
| The following reply was made to PR ports/124273; it has been noted by
GNATS.
|
| From: "Jack L." <xxjack12xx@gmail.com>
| To: bug-followup@freebsd.org
| Cc:
| Subject: Re: ports/124273: [patch] audio/audacity-devel fix desktop entry
| Date: Wed, 4 Jun 2008 18:29:24 -0700
|
|  Looks fine. Can the upgrade to 1.3.5 be commited along with this?

Do you have a patch already?
|
|  On Wed, Jun 4, 2008 at 3:50 PM, Edwin Groothuis <edwin@freebsd.org>
wrote:
|  > Maintainer of audio/audacity-devel,
|  >
|  > Please note that PR ports/124273 has just been submitted.
|  >
|  > If it contains a patch for an upgrade, an enhancement or a bug fix
|  > you agree on, reply to this email stating that you approve the patch
|  > and a committer will take care of it.
|  >
|  > The full text of the PR can be found at:
|  >    http://www.freebsd.org/cgi/query-pr.cgi?pr=ports/124273
|  >
|  > --
|  > Edwin Groothuis via the GNATS Auto Assign Tool
|  > edwin@FreeBSD.org
|  >


-- Pietro Cerutti gahr@FreeBSD.org PGP Public Key: http://gahr.ch/pgp
